name: koishi-plugin-ll-keyword-reply
description: Flexible keyword-auto-reply with regex, per-group, weekday scheduling

description.zh: 关键词自动回复插件。支持正则/包含匹配、同关键词不同群不同回复、星期调度、图片回复，插件设置页直接管理+命令管理。
description.en: Keyword auto-reply plugin. Regex/contains match, per-group, weekday schedule, config-page rule management + commands.
